title: chrysanthemum reboudianum
intro: Chrysanthemum reboudianum, also known as the Crested Yellow Mum, is a type of flowering plant in the chrysanthemum family. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb that has been used for centuries to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum reboudianum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
